---
title: "CIPSE RDS Analysis"
author: "Peter Kaberia"
editor: visual
format: 
  html:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
    df-print: tibble
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

## Overview

This website provides analysis and audit results for the CIPSE RDS (Respondent-Driven Sampling) study across multiple sites: Nairobi, Eldoret, Kisumu, and Mombasa.

### Key Features

- **Dashboard**: Interactive summary of audit results across all sites.
- **Site Reports**: Detailed reports for each individual site.

## Quick Summary

```{r, echo=FALSE}
source("R/setup.R")
source("R/functions.R")

sites <- c("Nairobi", "Eldoret", "Kisumu", "Mombasa")
results <- lapply(sites, run_rds_audit)
names(results) <- sites

# Overall summary
overall <- bind_rows(
  lapply(names(results), function(site) {
    results[[site]]$summary %>% mutate(Site = site)
  })
) %>% 
  group_by(metric) %>% 
  summarise(Total = sum(value), .groups = "drop")

overall
```
